docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,519.19 FILED BY BUNYAVIROCH, ARNOLD AS TO DEFENDANT SONG, ANDREW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY BUNYAVIROCH, ARNOLD SONG, ANDREW

PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER FOR EXAMINATION - SC-134, APPLICATION AND ORDER TO PRODUCE STATEMENT OF ASSETS AND TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $60.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUNYAVIROCH, ARNOLD SERVED FEB-23-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SONG, ANDREW

REMOVED FROM SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR ON APR-19-2018 IN DEPT. 506 -AT EXAMINATION OF DEBTOR BOTH PARTIES AGREED TO A PAYMENT SCHEDULE. NO FURTHER ACTION BY COURT. JPT: DIANNE PEEBLES; CLERK: B. PAREDES; NOT REPORTED; (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2017 - JUDGMENT.
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO ANDREW SONG (534 SHOTWELL , SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 944 408-691-8202
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $60.00 SERVED NOV-22-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SONG, ANDREW

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUNYAVIROCH, ARNOLD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SONG, ANDREW $3,519.19 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,629.19, DEFENDANT OWES A DUTY OF CARE TO PROTECT AGAINST INJURY OR DAMAGE TO PERSONS OR PROPERTY BY HIS INVITED GUESTS. DEFENDANT ACTED CARELESSLY OR NEGLIGENTLY IN SUPERVISING HIS HOUSE GUESTS WHICH RESULTED IN DAMAGE TO PLAINTIFF'S PROPERTY. DEFENDANT FAILED TO ESTABLISH THAT SAID DAMAGE WAS NECESSARILY CAUSED BY HIS GUESTS; CONSUMPTION OF ALCOHOL. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR COMPLETE DETAILS) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT SONG, ANDREW HEARING SET FOR APR-19-2018 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-28-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-28-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF ARNOLD BUNYAVIROCH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANDREW SONG IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SONG, ANDREW
